info.description: Gosh Mall is a full-stack e-commerce platform with user management, product catalog, shopping cart, order processing, payment, coupons, and admin features.
info.title: Gosh Mall API

get.description: Get all addresses for current user

put.description: Update a shipping address by ID

delete.description: Delete a shipping address by ID

get.description: Admin lists all banners
Admin lists all merchant applications
List users filtered by role (super admin only)

put.description: Update a user's role (super admin only)

get.description: Get all active banners for public display
Get the brand story content
List user's browse history with pagination

post.description: Record a product view in browse history

get.description: Get current user's cart items with SKU details

post.description: Add a product SKU to the current user's cart

get.description: Get the total number of items in the current user's cart

post.description: Merge guest cart items into the current user's cart after login
Select or deselect items in the cart for checkout

put.description: Update quantity or properties of a cart item

delete.description: Remove a product from the current user's cart

get.description: Get hierarchical category tree
Get category info by ID
Get available coupons for the current user

post.description: Calculate the discount for a coupon
User receives a coupon by ID

get.description: List user's favorite products with pagination
Get all active flash sales
Get the current user's merchant application

post.description: User applies to become a merchant

get.description: List current user's orders with pagination and filters

post.description: Create a new order from selected cart items

get.description: Get detailed info of a specific order

post.description: Apply loyalty points discount to an order
Add all items from a previous order back to the cart
Mark an order as shipped (admin only)

get.description: Get available payment methods

post.description: Initiate payment for an order using the specified method
Process a refund for a completed payment (admin only)

get.description: Get payment status by order number
Get the current user's point balance
Get the current user's point transaction history
List products with filters and pagination
Get popular search keywords
Search products with keyword and filters
Get current user's search history
Get detailed product info including SKUs

put.description: Update product status to on or off

get.description: List reviews for a product with pagination
Get current user profile with favorites count and order stats

post.description: Register with phone, password, and optional nickname

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer " followed by your JWT token
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
